title: ✈️ AI Travel Planner
hero_description: Welcome to AI Travel Planner, your intelligent travel companion. Generate personalized travel itineraries, optimize your budget, discover attractions, check weather forecasts and download professional trip reports.
feature1:
### 🗺️ AI Itinerary Generator
Generate complete day-wise travel plans based on destination, budget, duration and interests.
feature2:
### 💰 Budget Planning
Smart budget allocation for transport, hotels, food and activities.
feature3:
### 🤖 Travel Assistant
Ask questions like best places to visit, food recommendations and hidden attractions.
step1:
### Step 1
Enter destination, budget, days and travelers.
step2:
### Step 2
Select travel style, interests and preferences.
step3:
### Step 3
AI generates itinerary, budget plan and travel tips.
goa: Beaches, nightlife, water sports and seafood.
manali: Mountains, adventure sports and scenic beauty.
jaipur: Forts, palaces, culture and heritage sites.
navigation: Use the navigation menu in the sidebar to access Trip Planner, Budget Tracker and Travel Assistant.
sidebar_message: Click on Trip Planner from the sidebar to generate your first AI-powered travel itinerary.
footer: AI Travel Planner • Built with Streamlit, Gemini AI, Weather APIs and Interactive Maps
budget_description: Track your travel expenses and monitor your remaining budget.
no_budget:
No trip budget found.

Please generate a trip first from the Trip Planner page.
add_expense_chart: Add some expenses to see charts.
keep_eye: Keep an eye on your spending.
travel_assistant_description: Ask questions about your trip, destination, attractions, food, transportation, packing, weather, or travel tips.
sidebar_navigation: Use the sidebar to navigate through the application.
select_page: Select a page from the sidebar to get started.
trip_planner_info: Generate day-wise itineraries using Gemini AI or Ollama.
app_footer: Built with ❤️ using Streamlit and Gemini AI
welcome_heading: एआई ट्रैवल प्लानर में आपका स्वागत है
welcome_description: एआई की मदद से अपनी यात्रा की योजना बनाएं।
sidebar_navigation: ऐप का उपयोग करने के लिए साइडबार का उपयोग करें।
select_page: शुरू करने के लिए साइडबार से एक पेज चुनें।
trip_planner_info: जेमिनी एआई या ओलामा का उपयोग करके दिन-वार यात्रा योजना बनाएं।
budget_tracker_info: यात्रा खर्च और बजट को ट्रैक करें।
travel_assistant_info: अपने डेस्टिनेशन के बारे में सवाल पूछें।
app_footer: ❤️ के साथ बनाया गया Streamlit और Gemini AI द्वारा
